mission.title: dify: Pass input parameters to iframe
mission.description: Pass input parameters to iframe. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current dify setup
steps.description:
Verify your dify deployment is running:
```bash
docker compose ps
```
This feature requires a working dify installation.

steps.title: Review the feature request
steps.description: Users requested the ability to pass input parameters to the dify chatbot when embedded via iframe, enabling dynamic configuration of the chatbot from the parent page.

steps.title: Apply the iframe input parameters feature
steps.description:
The fix adds support for the `inputs` key in `difyChatbotConfig`, allowing input parameters to be passed to the embedded chatbot iframe. This enables parent pages to pre-populate chatbot inputs dynamically.

Upgrade to the dify version that includes this feature.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm that input parameters passed via `difyChatbotConfig.inputs` are correctly received by the embedded chatbot.

resolution.summary: Added support for the `inputs` key in `difyChatbotConfig` to allow passing input parameters to the dify chatbot when embedded via iframe, enabling dynamic configuration from the parent page.

prerequisites.description: Docker and Docker Compose for running dify. Alternatively, a Kubernetes cluster for K8s-based deployment.
